topics.title: American Idol and Ronnie Roast Discussion
topics.summary: The show features a discussion regarding the judging dynamics of American Idol, feedback on a military-themed radio segment, and a humorous recount of a prank interview involving Ronnie’s wife.

topics.title: Satellite Radio Competition and FCC Crackdown
topics.summary: The studio discusses the competitive landscape between Sirius and XM, reports of impending FCC fines for broadcast indecency, and features a roast of various personalities.

topics.title: Howard Stern Film Festival Announcement
topics.summary: The studio discusses the upcoming Howard Stern Film Festival and the expansion of the Howard TV platform.

topics.title: Howard Film Festival and American Idol Critique
topics.summary: The studio discusses the upcoming Howard Film Festival, including entry rules and prizes, before transitioning to a critique of Paula Abdul’s judging style on American Idol.

topics.title: Martha Stewart and Donald Trump Dispute
topics.summary: The studio discusses a public feud between Martha Stewart and Donald Trump regarding their respective television shows and the perceived lack of professional courtesy in their mutual criticisms.

topics.title: Ronnie and Bonnie Interview
topics.summary: The studio features a segment with Bonnie, the wife of limo driver Ronnie, who discusses his life, their marriage, and his experience being roasted on the show.

topics.title: Academy Awards Hosting and Celebrity Perks
topics.summary: The studio explores the dynamics of hosting the Academy Awards, comparing various hosts' performances while discussing the absurdity of celebrity gift baskets and promotional items.

topics.title: Academy Awards Hosting and Film Predictions
topics.summary: The studio discusses John Stewart's upcoming hosting of the Academy Awards, the pressures of high-profile hosting duties, and features a segment with Roger Ebert regarding film predictions.

topics.title: Academy Awards Hosting and Film Critiques
topics.summary: The studio discusses John Stewart's potential as an Oscar host, the merits of recent films like Brokeback Mountain and Crash, and Roger Ebert's professional history with Oprah Winfrey.

topics.title: Oprah Winfrey and Film Critiques
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding Oprah Winfrey's personal life and wealth, the controversial status of a restaurant owner in Michigan, and a review of recent superhero films with Roger Ebert.

topics.title: Roger Ebert and Dancing with the Stars
topics.summary: The studio features a conversation regarding Roger Ebert's film reviews, his relationship with Gene Siskel, and an analysis of Lisa's performance on Dancing with the Stars.

topics.title: Sexual Fantasies and Radio Industry Critique
topics.summary: The show features a discussion on sexual techniques and fantasies involving nurse costumes before transitioning into a critique of terrestrial radio's lack of originality and a segment featuring two individuals responding to listener questions.

topics.title: Government Policy and News Department Pranks
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding government oversight of port security and the internal fallout within the news department following a prank interview involving a reporter and a staff member's wife.

topics.title: FCC Rulings and Media Industry News
topics.summary: The studio discusses the FCC's enforcement of decency rulings against terrestrial radio, Viacom's financial struggles, a new film festival, and various entertainment industry headlines.

topics.title: Media Personalities and Industry News
topics.summary: The studio discusses various media topics including celebrity rumors involving Billy Joel, upcoming television remakes, local news regarding anthrax cases, and the professional careers of radio personalities.

topics.title: Media Reports and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The studio discusses a variety of topics including the identity of Bubba the Love Sponge, CBS's financial losses, Powerball lottery winners, the Dubai port deal, and George Clooney's Oscar nominations.
